changes.value:
## What

Entity-level commands are split inconsistently across two locations:

**In entity YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/*.yaml`):
- `ui.inspect`, `entity.archive`, `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö defined inline in `task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, etc.

**In command YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`, `attachment.yaml`):
- `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
- `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `attachment.yaml`  
- `attachment.delete` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
- `entity.cut`, `entity.copy`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö duplicated here AND in entity YAML
- `column.reorder`, `tag.update`, `entity.update_field`, `entity.delete`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`

The fix: entity-scoped commands should live in the entity definition that owns them. The command YAML format already supports all the fields needed (`scope`, `undoable`, `keys`, `params`, `menu`, `visible`, `context_menu`).

### Approach

1. Extend the `EntityCommand` struct in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` to carry the full command metadata currently in `CommandDef` (scope, undoable, params, menu, visible)
2. Move entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` into the appropriate entity YAML files:
   - `task.yaml`: `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete`
   - `tag.yaml`: `tag.update`, `task.untag` (dual-scoped)
   - `column.yaml`: `column.reorder`
   - `attachment.yaml`: `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal`
3. Update `scope_commands.rs` to read command metadata (scope, params, etc.) from entity definitions instead of the registry for entity-scoped commands
4. Remove the migrated entries from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml`

**Note:** Global commands (`app.*`, `ui.*`, `file.*`, `drag.*`, `settings.*`, `perspective.*`) stay in command YAML ŌĆö they aren't entity-scoped.

This is a **multi-card effort**. This card covers the **first step only**: extending `EntityCommand` to carry full command metadata and updating the entity YAML files. A follow-up card handles the `scope_commands.rs` merge logic and removal of duplicates from command YAML.

### Files to modify

- `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö extend `EntityCommand` struct with optional fields: `scope`, `undoable`, `visible`, `params`, `menu`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/task.yaml` ŌĆö add `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete` command entries
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` ŌĆö add `tag.update`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/column.yaml` ŌĆö add `column.reorder`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/attachment.yaml` ŌĆö add `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `EntityCommand` in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` supports all fields from `CommandDef` (scope, undoable, visible, params, menu) as optional
- [ ] All entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` are duplicated into the appropriate entity YAML files
- [ ] Existing entity YAML tests still pass ŌĆö `builtin_entities_parse_as_entity_def` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs`
- [ ] No behavior change yet ŌĆö command YAML files still loaded (dedup/removal is a follow-up card)

## Tests

- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö add round-trip test for `EntityCommand` with all new optional fields
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` ŌĆö `builtin_entities_parse_as_entity_def` passes with enriched YAML
- [ ] Run `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö all pass

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd` ŌĆö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
Move entity-scoped commands from command YAML into entity definition YAML

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,54 +1,36 @@
 ## What

-Entity-level commands are split inconsistently across two locations:
+`EntityCommand` in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` (lines 222-230) currently carries only `id`, `name`, `context_menu`, and `keys`. It needs to carry the same metadata as `CommandDef` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/types.rs` (lines 66-88) so entity YAML files can be the single source of truth for entity-scoped commands.

-**In entity YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/*.yaml`):
-- `ui.inspect`, `entity.archive`, `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö defined inline in `task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, etc.
+Add these optional fields to `EntityCommand`:
+- `undoable: bool` (default false)
+- `visible: Option<bool>` (default true, matching CommandDef)
+- `params: Vec<ParamDef>` (reuse or mirror the type from swissarmyhammer-commands)
+- `menu: Option<MenuPlacement>` (reuse or mirror)
+- `menu_name: Option<String>`
+- `scope: Option<String>` (for dual-scoped commands like `task.untag` which scopes to `entity:tag,entity:task`)

-**In command YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`, `attachment.yaml`):
-- `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
-- `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `attachment.yaml`  
-- `attachment.delete` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
-- `entity.cut`, `entity.copy`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö duplicated here AND in entity YAML
-- `column.reorder`, `tag.update`, `entity.update_field`, `entity.delete`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
-
-The fix: entity-scoped commands should live in the entity definition that owns them. The command YAML format already supports all the fields needed (`scope`, `undoable`, `keys`, `params`, `menu`, `visible`, `context_menu`).
+### Cross-crate dependency consideration

-### Approach
-
-1. Extend the `EntityCommand` struct in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` to carry the full command metadata currently in `CommandDef` (scope, undoable, params, menu, visible)
-2. Move entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` into the appropriate entity YAML files:
-   - `task.yaml`: `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete`
-   - `tag.yaml`: `tag.update`, `task.untag` (dual-scoped)
-   - `column.yaml`: `column.reorder`
-   - `attachment.yaml`: `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal`
-3. Update `scope_commands.rs` to read command metadata (scope, params, etc.) from entity definitions instead of the registry for entity-scoped commands
-4. Remove the migrated entries from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml`
-
-**Note:** Global commands (`app.*`, `ui.*`, `file.*`, `drag.*`, `settings.*`, `perspective.*`) stay in command YAML ŌĆö they aren't entity-scoped.
-
-This is a **multi-card effort**. This card covers the **first step only**: extending `EntityCommand` to carry full command metadata and updating the entity YAML files. A follow-up card handles the `scope_commands.rs` merge logic and removal of duplicates from command YAML.
+`EntityCommand` lives in `swissarmyhammer-fields`. `ParamDef` and `MenuPlacement` live in `swissarmyhammer-commands`. If fields already depends on commands, reuse the types directly. If not, either add the dependency or duplicate the struct definitions (with identical serde shapes) to avoid a circular dep. Check `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml`.

 ### Files to modify

-- `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö extend `EntityCommand` struct with optional fields: `scope`, `undoable`, `visible`, `params`, `menu`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/task.yaml` ŌĆö add `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete` command entries
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` ŌĆö add `tag.update`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/column.yaml` ŌĆö add `column.reorder`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/attachment.yaml` ŌĆö add `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal`
+- `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö extend `EntityCommand` with new optional fields
+- `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml` ŌĆö possibly add `swissarmyhammer-commands` dep (or duplicate types)

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `EntityCommand` in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` supports all fields from `CommandDef` (scope, undoable, visible, params, menu) as optional
-- [ ] All entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` are duplicated into the appropriate entity YAML files
-- [ ] Existing entity YAML tests still pass ŌĆö `builtin_entities_parse_as_entity_def` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs`
-- [ ] No behavior change yet ŌĆö command YAML files still loaded (dedup/removal is a follow-up card)
+- [ ] `EntityCommand` has fields: `undoable`, `visible`, `params`, `menu`, `menu_name`, `scope`
+- [ ] Existing entity YAML files (with only id/name/context_menu/keys) still parse without error
+- [ ] New fields are `#[serde(default)]` so they're backward-compatible
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields` passes

 ## Tests

-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö add round-trip test for `EntityCommand` with all new optional fields
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` ŌĆö `builtin_entities_parse_as_entity_def` passes with enriched YAML
-- [ ] Run `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö all pass
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö add YAML round-trip test for `EntityCommand` with all new fields populated
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö add test that existing minimal YAML (`{id: \"ui.inspect\", name: \"Inspect\"}`) still deserializes
+- [ ] Run `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields` ŌĆö all pass

 ## Workflow
changes.reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,36 +1,54 @@
 ## What

-`EntityCommand` in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` (lines 222-230) currently carries only `id`, `name`, `context_menu`, and `keys`. It needs to carry the same metadata as `CommandDef` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/types.rs` (lines 66-88) so entity YAML files can be the single source of truth for entity-scoped commands.
+Entity-level commands are split inconsistently across two locations:
+
+**In entity YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/*.yaml`):
+- `ui.inspect`, `entity.archive`, `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö defined inline in `task.yaml`, `tag.yaml`, etc.
+
+**In command YAML** (`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`, `attachment.yaml`):
+- `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
+- `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `attachment.yaml`  
+- `attachment.delete` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
+- `entity.cut`, `entity.copy`, `entity.paste` ŌĆö duplicated here AND in entity YAML
+- `column.reorder`, `tag.update`, `entity.update_field`, `entity.delete`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` ŌĆö entity-scoped but defined in `entity.yaml`
+
+The fix: entity-scoped commands should live in the entity definition that owns them. The command YAML format already supports all the fields needed (`scope`, `undoable`, `keys`, `params`, `menu`, `visible`, `context_menu`).
+
+### Approach

-Add these optional fields to `EntityCommand`:
-- `undoable: bool` (default false)
-- `visible: Option<bool>` (default true, matching CommandDef)
-- `params: Vec<ParamDef>` (reuse or mirror the type from swissarmyhammer-commands)
-- `menu: Option<MenuPlacement>` (reuse or mirror)
-- `menu_name: Option<String>`
-- `scope: Option<String>` (for dual-scoped commands like `task.untag` which scopes to `entity:tag,entity:task`)
+1. Extend the `EntityCommand` struct in `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` to carry the full command metadata currently in `CommandDef` (scope, undoable, params, menu, visible)
+2. Move entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` into the appropriate entity YAML files:
+   - `task.yaml`: `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete`
+   - `tag.yaml`: `tag.update`, `task.untag` (dual-scoped)
+   - `column.yaml`: `column.reorder`
+   - `attachment.yaml`: `attachment.open`, `attachment.reveal`
+3. Update `scope_commands.rs` to read command metadata (scope, params, etc.) from entity definitions instead of the registry for entity-scoped commands
+4. Remove the migrated entries from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml`

-### Cross-crate dependency consideration
+**Note:** Global commands (`app.*`, `ui.*`, `file.*`, `drag.*`, `settings.*`, `perspective.*`) stay in command YAML ŌĆö they aren't entity-scoped.

-`EntityCommand` lives in `swissarmyhammer-fields`. `ParamDef` and `MenuPlacement` live in `swissarmyhammer-commands`. If fields already depends on commands, reuse the types directly. If not, either add the dependency or duplicate the struct definitions (with identical serde shapes) to avoid a circular dep. Check `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml`.
+This is a **multi-card effort**. This card covers the **first step only**: extending `EntityCommand` to carry full command metadata and updating the entity YAML files. A follow-up card handles the `scope_commands.rs` merge logic and removal of duplicates from command YAML.

 ### Files to modify

-- `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö extend `EntityCommand` with new optional fields
-- `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml` ŌĆö possibly add `swissarmyhammer-commands` dep (or duplicate types)

+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/task.yaml` ŌĆö add `task.add`, `task.move`, `task.delete`, `task.untag`, `task.doThisNext`, `attachment.delete` command entries

+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/column.yaml` ŌĆö add `column.reorder`

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `EntityCommand` has fields: `undoable`, `visible`, `params`, `menu`, `menu_name`, `scope`
-- [ ] Existing entity YAML files (with only id/name/context_menu/keys) still parse without error
-- [ ] New fields are `#[serde(default)]` so they're backward-compatible
-- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields` passes

+- [ ] All entity-scoped commands from `entity.yaml` and `attachment.yaml` are duplicated into the appropriate entity YAML files
+- [ ] Existing entity YAML tests still pass ŌĆö `builtin_entities_parse_as_entity_def` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs`
+- [ ] No behavior change yet ŌĆö command YAML files still loaded (dedup/removal is a follow-up card)

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -14,10 +14,15 @@

 `EntityCommand` lives in `swissarmyhammer-fields`. `ParamDef` and `MenuPlacement` live in `swissarmyhammer-commands`. If fields already depends on commands, reuse the types directly. If not, either add the dependency or duplicate the struct definitions (with identical serde shapes) to avoid a circular dep. Check `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml`.

+### Frontend TypeScript mirror
+
+Also update the TypeScript `EntityCommand` interface at `kanban-app/ui/src/types/kanban.ts` (lines 11-16) to match the new fields. The frontend receives serialized entity defs via IPC ŌĆö the TS type must accept the new optional fields even if the frontend doesn't use them yet.
+
 ### Files to modify

 - `swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs` ŌĆö extend `EntityCommand` with new optional fields
 - `swissarmyhammer-fields/Cargo.toml` ŌĆö possibly add `swissarmyhammer-commands` dep (or duplicate types)
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/types/kanban.ts` ŌĆö add optional fields to `EntityCommand` interface

 ## Acceptance Criteria

@@ -24,6 +29,7 @@
 - [ ] `EntityCommand` has fields: `undoable`, `visible`, `params`, `menu`, `menu_name`, `scope`
 - [ ] Existing entity YAML files (with only id/name/context_menu/keys) still parse without error
 - [ ] New fields are `#[serde(default)]` so they're backward-compatible
+- [ ] TypeScript `EntityCommand` interface mirrors the new optional fields
 - [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-fields` passes

 ## Tests
